Title: Requires community median income be used by certain affordable housing programs in a city having a population of one million or more
Summary: Requires community median income be used by certain affordable housing programs in a city having a population of one million or more; requires affordable housing programs using state funding to cover 33 percent or more of the construction costs of a building or buildings to use community median income to determine income eligibility and rent levels; exempts programs utilizing federal funding.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to requiring community median income be used by certain affordable housing programs in a city having a population of one million or more
